goal: Bind one real detached-signature verifier note to the shared LIMEN attestation release bundle manifest without widening the package into truth, legality, compliance, certification, safety, or external-publication claims.

priority_artifact.task: Run one bounded local signing-and-verification pass over the shared release bundle manifest and emit a verifier note plus signature-sidecar metadata only if a safe non-public signer workflow is available.
expected_outputs: One verifier note describing exactly what file was signed, with what bounded signer description, and how verification was checked
One detached-signature sidecar or hash-bound signature reference linked to the manifest
One machine-readable status row or patch plan for the attestation trust-readiness surfaces
If no safe signer material is available, one explicit blocker note stating why the route remains unavailable without storing or exposing credentials
operator_constraints: Do not print, commit, or store private keys in the project tree, chat output, or durable logs.
Use only pre-existing safe signer material outside the repository or an ephemeral operator-managed signing flow that leaves only public verification material behind.
If signer provenance cannot be explained conservatively, fail closed and emit a blocker note rather than a weak trust claim.

Keep the verifier note explicit that detached-signature verification improves release-integrity evidence only; it does not prove allegation truth, legality, compliance, certification, safety, or external publication witness.

safe_resource_limits.cpu: single host, one manifest plus one sidecar verification pass

paper_thesis_use: Route C methods note distinguishing local bundle provenance from detached-signature release-integrity evidence.
Table 1G / LIMEN-VIS-016 upgrade path from project_shared_local_bundle to signature-verified release state, using the refreshed v0.10 local bundle as the active target.
Thesis reproducibility appendix explaining why stronger trust surfaces require operational signer discipline rather than only schema design.
success_condition: Either a real detached-signature verifier note becomes attachable to the shared release bundle manifest with conservative signer-language and verification fields, or the project gains an explicit machine-readable blocker note showing that no safe signer workflow is currently available under the no-credential-exposure boundary.
boundary_notes: Public/open information and local Tyche artifacts only.
No external submission, transparency-log upload, portal interaction, or email outreach.
Do not widen any claim beyond observation/process provenance plus, at most, bounded release-integrity verification.
If any step would require persisting secret key material in the repository, abort that route and record the blocker instead.
